tasks.check: deno fmt --check . && deno lint . && deno check
tasks.compile: deno task build && deno compile --no-config --output john-town --include _fresh -A compile-entry.ts
tasks.compile:aarch64: deno task build && deno compile --no-config --target aarch64-apple-darwin --output john-town-aarch64-apple-darwin --include _fresh -A compile-entry.ts
tasks.compile:x86_64: deno task build && deno compile --no-config --target x86_64-apple-darwin --output john-town-x86_64-apple-darwin --include _fresh -A compile-entry.ts
